regions.text: They are shoes. He is putting his shoes on his feet. They are toothpaste and a toothbrush. She is brushing her teeth.
They are shirts. He is putting his things in his bag. It is soap. She is washing her hands.
He got his ticket at the ticket office in the station. The journey was four days long. They said, "Did you have a good journey?" They are learning reading and writing at school.
The ticket was $132.35. No. He did not go in an airplane. He went in a train. He said, "I had a good journey and will send you a long letter tomorrow. Love. John." She sent love from Tom and Jane.
